steps.title: Set x equal to zero
steps.content:
The $y$-intercept occurs where $x=0$. Substitute $0$ into the function:
$$f(0)=3(0)-\frac{1}{5}$$

steps.title: Write the intercept point
steps.content:
Evaluate the function value:
$$f(0)=-\frac{1}{5}$$
So the intercept point is
$$(0,-\frac{1}{5})$$
The answer is A.
